subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I am a servant who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and stand assured of Thy oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انی عبد آمنت بک و بایاتک و اکون موقنا بوحدانیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
